description_long: This object is a small potted plant with a short, thick stem and three broad, flat, green leaves. The leaves have a slightly waxy appearance and are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, with one leaf extending further than the others. The stem appears woody and dark, with a rough texture and a cut or broken end. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the plant may have been recently removed from its pot or is a cutting. The overall form is compact and the leaves are healthy, with no visible flowers or decorative elements. The plant resembles a succulent or cactus variety, commonly found in urban environments for decorative purposes.
description: A small, leafy green plant with a thick woody stem and three broad leaves, resembling a succulent or cactus cutting.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from above, highlighting the thick stem and the radial arrangement of the three broad leaves.
description_view_1: This view shows the plant from the side, emphasizing the length of the leaves and the texture of the stem.
description_view_2: The underside of the plant is visible, showing the bottom surface of the leaves and the base of the stem.
description_view_3: A rear angle reveals the cut or broken end of the stem and the alignment of the leaves.
